### CMD #761
# ID: toolu_01YPcSwFjn6Mrr6mh7AyXqtr
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json
BASE = "https://api.smarkets.com/v3"

markets = {
    "119427046": "Full-time result",
    "119427076": "BTTS and over/under 2.5",
    "119427071": "Penalty to be awarded",
    "144613807": "Player to be sent off",
    "119427167": "England -0.5 corners / Croatia +0.5 corners",
    "119427064": "Highest scoring half",
    "119427101": "2H England O/U 0.5 goals",
    "119427111": "2H Croatia O/U 0.5 goals",
}

out = {}
for mid, label in markets.items():
    cr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/{mid}/contracts/", timeout=20).json()
    contracts = cr.get("contracts", [])
    cids = [c["id"] for c in contracts]
    names = {c["id"]: c.get("name") or c["contract_type"].get("name") for c in contracts}
    qr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/{mid}/quotes/", params={"contract_ids": ",".join(cids)}, timeout=20).json()
    priced = {}
    for cid, q in qr.items():
        bid = q.get("bids",[])
        offer = q.get("offers",[])
        bb = bid[0]["price"]/100 if bid else None
        bo = offer[0]["price"]/100 if offer else None
        mid_p = (bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
        priced[names.get(cid, cid)] = round(mid_p,4) if mid_p else None
    out[mid] = {"label": label, "quotes": priced}
    print(f"\n=== {label} ({mid}) ===")
    for k,v in priced.items():
        if v: print(f"  {k}: {v}")

with open("eng_cro_smarkets_quotes.json","w") as f:
    json.dump(out, f, indent=2)
EOF

```

### CMD #762
# ID: toolu_015L5dnFrawSxsXKWjZXpKQa
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json

LEAGUES = ["fifa.world","fifa.friendly","fifa.worldq.uefa","fifa.worldq.conmebol","fifa.worldq.caf","fifa.worldq.concacaf","fifa.worldq.afc"]

events = {
    "England": [724902, 762553, 762554, 401860828, 401860829],
    "Croatia": [724907, 401847048, 401843261, 401856361, 401856623],
}

out = open("eng_cro_wc2026_raw.jsonl","w")
for team, evlist in events.items():
    for eid in evlist:
        found = None
        for lg in LEAGUES:
            try:
                r = requests.get(f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{lg}/summary", params={"event": eid}, timeout=10)
                if r.status_code != 200: continue
                d = r.json()
                bx = d.get('boxscore',{}).get('teams',[])
                if bx and any(s.get('statistics') for s in bx):
                    found = (lg, d)
                    break
            except: continue
        if not found:
            print(f"{team} {eid}: NOT FOUND")
            out.write(json.dumps({"team":team,"event":eid,"found":False})+"\n")
            continue
        lg, d = found
        names = [t['team']['displayName'] for t in d['boxscore']['teams']]
        stats = {}
        for t in d['boxscore']['teams']:
            nm = t['team']['displayName']
            stats[nm] = {s['name']: s.get('displayValue') for s in t['statistics']}
        date = d.get('header',{}).get('competitions',[{}])[0].get('date','?')
        print(f"{team} {eid} [{lg}]: {names} {date}")
        for nm,st in stats.items():
            print(f"  {nm}: fouls={st.get('foulsCommitted')} offsides={st.get('offsides')} SOT={st.get('shotsOnTarget')} corners={st.get('wonCorners')} YC={st.get('yellowCards')}")
        out.write(json.dumps({"team":team,"event":eid,"league":lg,"date":date,"names":names,"stats":stats,"found":True})+"\n")
        out.flush()
out.close()
EOF

```

```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json
BASE = "https://api.smarkets.com/v3"

# Player 0.5+ SOT for Kane (Q5) and Sucic (Q10)
cr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/145120112/contracts/", timeout=20).json()
contracts = cr.get("contracts", [])
cids = [c["id"] for c in contracts]
names = {c["id"]: c.get("name","") for c in contracts}
qr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/145120112/quotes/", params={"contract_ids": ",".join(cids)}, timeout=20).json()

targets = {}
for cid, q in qr.items():
    nm = names.get(cid,"")
    bid = q.get("bids",[]); offer = q.get("offers",[])
    bb = bid[0]["price"]/100 if bid else None
    bo = offer[0]["price"]/100 if offer else None
    mid_p = (bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
    if nm and mid_p:
        targets[nm] = mid_p

# Print relevant players
print("=== Player 0.5+ SOT (full match) ===")
for nm, p in sorted(targets.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:12]:
    marker = " <<" if any(n in nm for n in ["Kane","Saka","Bellingham","Sucic","Modric","Kramaric","Budimir"]) else ""
    print(f"  {nm}: {p:.4f}{marker}")

# Also fetch "Any player sent off" for Q3
try:
    cr2 = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/119427195/contracts/", timeout=10).json()
    if cr2.get("contracts"):
        cids2=[c["id"] for c in cr2["contracts"]]
        qr2=requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/119427195/quotes/",params={"contract_ids":",".join(cids2)},timeout=10).json()
        print("\n=== Any player sent off ===")
        for cid,q in qr2.items():
            bid=q.get("bids",[]); offer=q.get("offers",[])
            bb=bid[0]["price"]/100 if bid else None
            bo=offer[0]["price"]/100 if offer else None
            mid=(bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
            nm=cr2["contracts"][[c["id"] for c in cr2["contracts"]].index(cid)].get("name","?") if cid in [c["id"] for c in cr2["contracts"]] else cid
            if mid: print(f"  {nm}: {mid}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"No 'any player sent off' market: {e}")
EOF

### CMD #764
# ID: toolu_01XTLPYVFQ1VPV9mJ91s8GSp
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json
BASE = "https://api.smarkets.com/v3"

# Get full player SOT market to find Sucic and full rankings
cr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/145120112/contracts/", timeout=20).json()
contracts = cr.get("contracts", [])
cids = [c["id"] for c in contracts]
names = {c["id"]: c.get("name","") for c in contracts}
qr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/145120112/quotes/", params={"contract_ids": ",".join(cids)}, timeout=20).json()

results = []
for cid, q in qr.items():
    nm = names.get(cid,"")
    bid = q.get("bids",[]); offer = q.get("offers",[])
    bb = bid[0]["price"]/100 if bid else None
    bo = offer[0]["price"]/100 if offer else None
    mid_p = (bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
    if nm and mid_p:
        results.append((mid_p, nm, bb, bo))

results.sort(reverse=True)
print("=== ALL Player 0.5+ SOT (full match) prices ===")
for p,nm,bb,bo in results:
    marker = " <<<" if "Sucic" in nm or "Sučić" in nm or "Modric" in nm or "Kovac" in nm else ""
    print(f"  {nm}: mid={p:.4f} (bid={bb} offer={bo}){marker}")

import math
# Kane 2H scaling
kane_full = 0.6734
lam_full = -math.log(1-kane_full)
lam_2h = lam_full / 2
kane_2h = 1 - math.exp(-lam_2h)
print(f"\nKane full-match={kane_full:.4f} -> λ={lam_full:.3f} -> λ_2H={lam_2h:.3f} -> P(Kane SOT in 2H)={kane_2h:.4f}")
EOF

```

### CMD #765
# ID: toolu_01QqHRBKR47ajNQh1SVQVMB4
```
python3 -c "
import math
# FTR vig normalization
ftr_sum = 58.65+16.4+24.695
eng_win = 58.65/ftr_sum; draw = 24.695/ftr_sum; cro_win = 16.4/ftr_sum
print(f'FTR: England={eng_win:.4f} Draw={draw:.4f} Croatia={cro_win:.4f}')

# BTTS+2.5
btts_sum=36.67+11.62+10.86+40.695
btts_yes_over=36.67/btts_sum
print(f'BTTS+3+goals={btts_yes_over:.4f}')

# Highest scoring half
hsf_sum=29.765+26.995+43.56
sec_half=43.56/hsf_sum
print(f'2H more goals than 1H={sec_half:.4f}')

# Penalty
pen_sum=28.375+72.315
pen_yes=28.375/pen_sum
print(f'Penalty={pen_yes:.4f}')

# 2H England goals
eng2h_sum=37.36+62.8
eng2h_over=62.8/eng2h_sum
print(f'England 2H score: {eng2h_over:.4f}  ->  lambda={-math.log(1-eng2h_over):.3f}')

# 2H Croatia goals
cro2h_sum=62.8+37.325
cro2h_over=37.325/cro2h_sum
print(f'Croatia 2H score: {cro2h_over:.4f}  ->  lambda={-math.log(1-cro2h_over):.3f}')

# Q1 England more 2H SOT - Skellam
eng_sot_full=5.6; cro_sot_full=4.0
lam_e=eng_sot_full/2; lam_c=cro_sot_full/2
diff=lam_e-lam_c; vr=lam_e+lam_c; sd=math.sqrt(vr)
z_raw=diff/sd; z_cont=(diff-0.5)/sd
p_raw=0.5*(1+math.erf(z_raw/math.sqrt(2)))
p_cont=0.5*(1+math.erf(z_cont/math.sqrt(2)))
print(f'Q1 England>Croatia 2H SOT: raw={p_raw:.4f} continuity={p_cont:.4f}')

# Q4 England more fouls - Skellam
lam_ef=8.2; lam_cf=13.0
diff_f=lam_ef-lam_cf; sd_f=math.sqrt(lam_ef+lam_cf)
p_f=0.5*(1+math.erf(diff_f/sd_f/math.sqrt(2)))
print(f'Q4 England>Croatia fouls: {p_f:.4f}')

# Q6 Croatia more corners at HT (neutral venue adjusted)
lam_ec=3.5; lam_cc=2.0  # neutral venue adjustments
diff_c=lam_cc-lam_ec; sd_c=math.sqrt(lam_cc+lam_ec)
z_c_cont=(diff_c-0.5)/sd_c
p_c_cont=0.5*(1+math.erf(z_c_cont/sd_c))  # rough
p_c=0.5*(1+math.erf(diff_c/sd_c/math.sqrt(2)))
print(f'Q6 Croatia>England corners at HT: raw={p_c:.4f}')

# Q7 Croatia 2+ offsides
lam_o=1.0
p_off=1-math.exp(-lam_o)*(1+lam_o)
print(f'Q7 Croatia 2+ offsides: {p_off:.4f}')

# Q8 Both teams 1+ SOT 2H
p_eng_sot2h=1-math.exp(-lam_e)
p_cro_sot2h=1-math.exp(-lam_c)
print(f'Q8 Both 1+ SOT 2H: P(ENG)={p_eng_sot2h:.4f} P(CRO)={p_cro_sot2h:.4f} product={p_eng_sot2h*p_cro_sot2h:.4f}')

# Q5 Kane 2H SOT
kane_full=0.6734
lam_kane=-math.log(1-kane_full); lam_kane_2h=lam_kane/2
kane_2h=1-math.exp(-lam_kane_2h)
print(f'Q5 Kane 2H SOT: {kane_2h:.4f}')

# Sučić illiquid adjustment
sucic_raw=0.4587
sucic_adj=sucic_raw*0.945
print(f'Q10 Sucic SOT: {sucic_adj:.4f}')
"

```

### CMD #770
# ID: toolu_01ADQoLndfKxALuPtRKkdkw2
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json

LEAGUES = ["fifa.world","fifa.friendly","fifa.worldq.caf","fifa.worldq.concacaf","fifa.worldq.conmebol","fifa.worldq.uefa","fifa.worldq.afc"]

events = {
    "Ghana": [760052, 401856593, 762773, 401861774, 401863573],
    "Panama": [401860541, 401860542, 401864003, 401870075, 401871528],
}

out = open("gha_pan_wc2026_raw.jsonl","w")
for team, evlist in events.items():
    for eid in evlist:
        found = None
        for lg in LEAGUES:
            try:
                r = requests.get(f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{lg}/summary", params={"event": eid}, timeout=10)
                if r.status_code != 200: continue
                d = r.json()
                bx = d.get('boxscore',{}).get('teams',[])
                if bx and any(s.get('statistics') for s in bx):
                    found = (lg, d); break
            except: continue
        if not found:
            print(f"{team} {eid}: NOT FOUND")
            out.write(json.dumps({"team":team,"event":eid,"found":False})+"\n")
            continue
        lg, d = found
        names = [t['team']['displayName'] for t in d['boxscore']['teams']]
        stats = {}
        for t in d['boxscore']['teams']:
            nm = t['team']['displayName']
            stats[nm] = {s['name']: s.get('displayValue') for s in t['statistics']}
        date = d.get('header',{}).get('competitions',[{}])[0].get('date','?')
        print(f"{team} {eid} [{lg}]: {names} {date}")
        for nm,st in stats.items():
            print(f"  {nm}: fouls={st.get('foulsCommitted')} offsides={st.get('offsides')} SOT={st.get('shotsOnTarget')} corners={st.get('wonCorners')} YC={st.get('yellowCards')}")
        out.write(json.dumps({"team":team,"event":eid,"league":lg,"date":date,"names":names,"stats":stats,"found":True})+"\n")
        out.flush()
out.close()
EOF

```

### CMD #771
# ID: toolu_01M4v5PxUYub16n5GPWzjM45
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests, json
BASE = "https://api.smarkets.com/v3"

# get full market list to find 2H 1.5 goals market
cr_all = requests.get(f"{BASE}/events/44754858/markets/", timeout=20).json()
for m in cr_all.get('markets',[]):
    if '1.5' in m.get('name','') and ('Second' in m.get('name','') or 'second' in m.get('name','')):
        print(m['id'], m['name'])

print("---")

markets_to_fetch = {
    "119428352": "Full-time result",
    "119428370": "Highest scoring half",
    "119428377": "Penalty to be awarded",
    "119428407": "2H Ghana O/U 0.5 goals",
    "119428417": "2H Panama O/U 0.5 goals",
    "119428472": "Ghana -0.5 corners / Panama +0.5 corners",
}

result = {}
for mid, label in markets_to_fetch.items():
    cr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/{mid}/contracts/", timeout=15).json()
    contracts = cr.get("contracts", [])
    cids = [c["id"] for c in contracts]
    names = {c["id"]: c.get("name") or c["contract_type"].get("name") for c in contracts}
    qr = requests.get(f"{BASE}/markets/{mid}/quotes/", params={"contract_ids": ",".join(cids)}, timeout=15).json()
    priced = {}
    for cid, q in qr.items():
        bid=q.get("bids",[]); offer=q.get("offers",[])
        bb=bid[0]["price"]/100 if bid else None
        bo=offer[0]["price"]/100 if offer else None
        mid_p=(bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
        nm=names.get(cid,cid)
        if mid_p: priced[nm] = round(mid_p,4)
    result[mid] = {"label":label,"quotes":priced}
    print(f"\n=== {label} ===")
    for k,v in priced.items():
        if v: print(f"  {k}: {v}")

with open("gha_pan_smarkets_quotes.json","w") as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
EOF

```

### CMD #773
# ID: toolu_017ZoHV1vSDAkU9AgfKAQhqe
```
cd "/Users/aki/Desktop/QK Rstudio/sportspredict_research/data/external_markets" && python3 -c "
import requests, json, math
BASE = 'https://api.smarkets.com/v3'

# Q4: 2H over/under 1.5 goals
cr = requests.get(f'{BASE}/markets/119428398/contracts/', timeout=15).json()
cids=[c['id'] for c in cr.get('contracts',[])]
names={c['id']:c.get('name') or c['contract_type'].get('name') for c in cr.get('contracts',[])}
qr = requests.get(f'{BASE}/markets/119428398/quotes/', params={'contract_ids':','.join(cids)}, timeout=15).json()
print('=== 2H Over/Under 1.5 (2+ 2H goals) ===')
total=0
prices={}
for cid,q in qr.items():
    bid=q.get('bids',[]); offer=q.get('offers',[])
    bb=bid[0]['price']/100 if bid else None
    bo=offer[0]['price']/100 if offer else None
    mid_p=(bb+bo)/2 if (bb and bo) else (bb or bo)
    nm=names.get(cid,cid)
    if mid_p:
        prices[nm]=mid_p
        total+=mid_p
        print(f'  {nm}: {mid_p}')
print(f'  OVER (2+ 2H goals) vig-adj: {prices.get(\"OVER\",0)/total:.4f}')

# Compute estimates
print()
# FTR
ftrs = [40.65, 29.42, 30.31]; s=sum(ftrs)
print(f'Ghana FTR vig-adj: {ftrs[0]/s:.4f}')
# player props illiquid adj
for nm,p in [('Semenyo',0.7143),('Fajardo',0.6061)]:
    print(f'{nm} SOT full-match: {p:.4f} x0.945 = {p*0.945:.4f}')
# Panama first 2H goal (Poisson race)
lam_g=0.713; lam_p=0.567; lam_tot=lam_g+lam_p
p_pan_first = lam_p/lam_tot * (1-math.exp(-lam_tot))
print(f'Panama scores first 2H goal (Poisson race): {p_pan_first:.4f}')
"

```

### OUT
=== 2H Over/Under 1.5 (2+ 2H goals) ===
  Under 1.5 goals: 63.95
  Over 1.5 goals: 36.47
  OVER (2+ 2H goals) vig-adj: 0.0000

Semenyo SOT full-match: 0.7143 x0.945 = 0.6750
Fajardo SOT full-match: 0.6061 x0.945 = 0.5728
Panama scores first 2H goal (Poisson race): 0.3198

```
for pair in "GHA-PAN:760434" "ENG-CRO:760437" "UZB-COL:760436"; do
  match="${pair%%:*}"; id="${pair##*:}"
  curl -s "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/fifa.world/summary?event=$id" -o /tmp/${match}_final.json
done && python3 << 'EOF'
import json

for match, eid in [("GHA-PAN","760434"),("ENG-CRO","760437"),("UZB-COL","760436")]:
    d = json.load(open(f'/tmp/{match}_final.json'))
    print(f"\n{'='*20} {match} {'='*20}")
    for team in d['boxscore']['teams']:
        stats = {s['name']: s.get('displayValue') for s in team['statistics']}
        print(f"  {team['team']['displayName']}: fouls={stats.get('foulsCommitted')} YC={stats.get('yellowCards')} offsides={stats.get('offsides')} SOT={stats.get('shotsOnTarget')} totalShots={stats.get('totalShots')} poss={stats.get('possessionPct')}")
    print("  Goals/Cards:")
    for ev in d.get('keyEvents',[]):
        typ = ev.get('type',{}).get('text','')
        if 'Goal' in typ or 'Card' in typ:
            print(f"    {ev.get('clock',{}).get('displayValue','?')} | {typ} | {ev.get('team',{}).get('displayName','')} | {ev.get('text','')[:100]}")
EOF

```
